summary: This document is a structured interview guide template designed for conducting user research with senior citizens regarding their care needs and daily living challenges. It outlines specific objectives, demographic questions, and inquiries about current solutions and pain points, alongside best practices for interviewers. The guide also includes specific notes on hiring part-time keepers and tips for avoiding bias during the conversation.

sniff_test_notes: Contains mixed language instructions with Spanish tips embedded in an English document.
